Author: SunnysOfficial
Name: Venue Mapper
Description: A Dalamud plugin for discovering FFXIV venues with 2D/3D interactive markers, live events, and built-in owner tools. Your complete FFXIV venue guide.
Changelog:
## What's Changed in v0.5.6

**Owner Setup**
- Added house size field (L / M / S)
- Added 'Detect from Current Position' button — auto-fills DC, server, district, ward, plot and house size
- Improved: House size auto-detected from district and plot number
- Improved: Owner Setup fully translated to German
- Fixed: Housing district now detected correctly inside and outside houses
- Changed: Window height increased to fit all fields

**General**
- Added colored status tags in changelog (ADDED / IMPROVED / CHANGED / FIXED / REMOVED)
- Improved: German translations completed for changelog, directory filter, and About tab
- Changed: Main window minimum size increased
- Changed: Discord button in About tab now labeled 'Support Discord'
- Fixed: 3D markers no longer visible on the character selection screen after logging out
